original_image_tags: A dark document form with typed text in white. At the top center, the word "RESTRICTED" is stamped in large, bold, block letters. To the left of the checklist, the text "INCIDENT 133" is typed. At the bottom right, below the remarks, the number "66" is handwritten, and the word "RESTRICTED" is stamped again in large, bold, block letters. There are two punched holes visible on the left margin.

elements.description: The word 'RESTRICTED' is stamped prominently at the top center of the page, partially obscured by two white circular punch holes.
The word 'RESTRICTED' is stamped again at the bottom of the page, partially cut off by the edge.

judge.reason: Both agree on the 'RESTRICTED' stamps at top and bottom, but B omits the 'INCIDENT 133' text and handwritten '66' that A reports, without contradiction.
